source.title: Temu vs Shein vs Amazon Delivery Time Comparison 2025-2026

extractions.claim: Temu standard delivery: 7-15 business days (free); express: 3-7 days (~$12.90, waived over $129); real delivery often 6-28 days
extractions.evidence: Standard delivery takes 7-15 business days and is usually free. Express delivery takes 3-7 business days and costs around $12.90, often waived if order is over $129. Some have received orders within 6 days, while shipping issues including 3-4 week delays have also been reported.

extractions.claim: Amazon Prime: 1-2 business days; standard: 3-5 days. Same-day delivery zones expanding.
extractions.evidence: Amazon Prime shipping 1-2 business days for members. Standard shipping typically 3-5 business days. Amazon continues expanding same-day delivery zones.

extractions.claim: Shein standard: 8-11 business days; 94% on-time delivery rate vs Temu's 82%
extractions.evidence: Shein standard shipping takes 8-11 business days. Shein excels in consistency - 94% of packages arrived within estimated window, higher than Temu's 82%. Shein plans two more US distribution centers by late 2025.

extractions.claim: Cross-border delivery getting faster: parcels taking 15+ days declined from 29% in 2020 to 7% in 2025
extractions.evidence: The proportion of parcels taking 15 days or more decreased sharply from 29% in 2020 to 7% in 2025. 20% of cross-border shoppers said 10-14 day transit common, 19% said 4-5 day transit common.

verification.verifier_notes: From cross-border e-commerce shipping survey data

extractions.claim: Temu matched Amazon in cross-border e-commerce market share (24% each) in 2025, up from 1% in 2022
extractions.evidence: Temu matched Amazon in cross-border e-commerce sales during 2025 with a 24% share of the market, highlighting the company's growth from just 1% in 2022.
